purpose: Stylesheet for the dashboard left-side tab bar (.sidebar-tab-bar) used by the main app sidebar — Code Explorer / Dashboards toggle. Defines stacked tab rows (.sidebar-tab-row), individual tab buttons (.sidebar-tab) with active/hover/focus states, the add button (.sidebar-add-btn) and toggle button (.sidebar-toggle-btn) that pin to the right side via margin-left:auto.
gotchas: Class names .sidebar-tab / .sidebar-tab-bar are quite generic — be careful not to introduce a different .sidebar-tab in another stylesheet.
Loaded both globally (main.jsx) and via Sidebar.jsx — duplicate-import safe but noisy in the dependency graph.
patterns: Pinned-right buttons via margin-left:auto inside flex row.
Active state applied via .sidebar-tab.active conditional class.
